metadata.title: betooxx | Web Developer
metadata.description: betooxx's personal site — web developer crafting digital experiences.

about.paragraph1: I'm a web developer passionate about creating digital experiences that blend elegant design with solid engineering. With over five years of experience, I specialize in building modern, scalable web applications.
about.quote: My goal is to transform complex ideas into intuitive and memorable interfaces.
about.paragraph2: I work with technologies like React, Next.js, TypeScript and Node.js to take projects from conception to production. I'm passionate about clean code, web performance and accessibility.
about.paragraph3: Outside of code, you'll find me exploring new technologies, sharing knowledge on my blog, or looking for the next idea to build.

proyecto-saas.title: Analytics SaaS Platform
proyecto-saas.description: Real-time dashboard for business metrics visualization. Serverless architecture with data processing at scale.

app-mobile.description: Mobile application for task and habit management with cloud synchronization.

arquitectura-frontend-2026.excerpt: A tour of the architectural patterns that are defining how we build modern web applications, from server components to micro-frontends.

contact.description: I'm always open to new projects, creative ideas or the opportunity to be part of something great.
